zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg於1157年出生在奧地利提洛爾梅朗時，她的父親Hartman III von Dillingen19歲，母親Richenza von Lenzburg23歲。她於大約1190年與Liutold von Regensburg IV結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1243年10月13日在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg于1157年出生在奥地利提洛爾梅朗时，她的父亲Hartman III von Dillingen19岁，母亲Richenza von Lenzburg23岁。她于大约1190年与Liutold von Regensburg IV结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1243年10月13日在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg was born in 1157, in Meran, Tirol, Austria, her father, Hartman III von Dillingen, was 19 and her mother, Richenza von Lenzburg, was 23. She married Liutold von Regensburg IV about 1190. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 October 1243, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 86.

fr.Kyburg-Dillingen, Germany: Dillingen, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg est née en 1157, à Meran, Tirol, Autriche, son père, Hartman III von Dillingen, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Richenza von Lenzburg, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Liutold von Regensburg IV environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 octobre 1243, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg 1157 in Meran, Tirol, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hartman III von Dillingen 19 und ihre Mutter Richenza von Lenzburg 23. Sie hat um 1190 Liutold von Regensburg IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Oktober 1243 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg è nata il nel 1157 nel Meran, Tirolo, Austria, sua padre, Hartman III von Dillingen, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Richenza von Lenzburg, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Liutold von Regensburg IV circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 ottobre 1243, nel Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hedwig Countess von Kyrburgが1157年にオーストリアティロルメランで生まれた時，父Hartman III von Dillingenは19歳，母Richenza von Lenzburgは23歳であった。約1190年にLiutold von Regensburg IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1243年10月13日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg(이)가 1157년 오스트리아 티럴 머란에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hartman III von Dillingen(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richenza von Lenzburg(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 Liutold von Regensburg IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 10월 13일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg nasceu em 1157, em Meran, Tirol, Áustria, seu pai, Hartman III von Dillingen, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Richenza von Lenzburg, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Liutold von Regensburg IV aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1243, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg родилась в 1157 г. в местности миран, тирол, Австрия, её отцу по имени Hartman III von Dillingen было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza von Lenzburg, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Liutold von Regensburg IV около 1190 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 октября 1243 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hedwig Countess von Kyrburg nació en 1157, en Meran, Tirol, Austria, su papá, Hartman III von Dillingen, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Richenza von Lenzburg, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Liutold von Regensburg IV aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1243, en Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 86 años.
